_comment: CCI acronym valid fixture. Body defines acronyms before use.
body: 1. The Department of the Navy (DON) requires all units to comply with established correspondence standards.
2. Per the Standard Navy Distribution List (SNDL), all commands must update their distribution lists quarterly.
3. The DON will conduct a review of all correspondence practices annually.
4. Commands shall verify SNDL entries before sending official correspondence.
